payload.author: claude
payload.body:
AGENT BRIEFING (read before investigating).

FULL CONTEXT: read epic SCP-120 and validation spike SCP-121 first (thesis = agent-operated multiplayer kanban; relay prevents parallel-agent collisions).

DECIDED CONSTRAINTS:
- Offline-first is REQUIRED for v1 — do NOT scope this down to an online-only relay. Full pull/push sync-cursor + reconciliation stays in scope.
- High-frequency event to propagate fast = STATUS CLAIM (ticket -> in_progress), which happens BEFORE any branch/commit, so git cannot carry it. Optimistic-claim + fast-converge is the core.
- Every event's actor = '{model} on behalf of {user}' (see SCP-128 / SCP-122).

WHERE TO LOOK:
- src/event-store.js (append-only ULID-named JSON files = the event format + union-on-pull semantics)
- src/replay.js (deterministic replay, canonical order by (ts, id))
- src/event-schema.js (event kinds + validation)
- docs/event-log-format.md and docs/adr/0001-decentralized-ticket-identity.md
- SCP-110 display-number de-collision (grep the repo / event log for it)
- App/Sources/Network/EventStream.swift (how iOS consumes realtime today)

STILL OPEN (your job): cursor format (ULID high-water vs per-tenant monotonic seq vs vector clock), push/pull endpoint shapes, the interleave-on-late-upload reconciliation algorithm (must match local file-union replay), idempotency, fresh-client bootstrap, how renumber notices reach a client that already showed SCP-42. Coordinate w/ SCP-122 (actor verification) and SCP-124 (where canonical log lives).

DELIVERABLE: comment a proposed protocol spec here, then spawn implementation child stories with parent=SCP-120.
